examples: He had spent several uproarious evenings at the Embassy Club.
This utterance of his was greeted with bursts of uproarious laughter.
We often use it to describe some uproarious festivities.
Its marketing acumen is such that an iCassette Player would still be released to uproarious applause.
Thousands of Occupy Wall Street plan to take to the streets on May 18 in uproarious laughter.
